data.content:
Economic Development Department
The Economic Development Department is a department within the New Taipei City government, led by Sheng Xiaorong, responsible for economic development and implementing the crowdfunding program.

New Taipei City
New Taipei City is a city in Taiwan that launched the New Taipei City Crowdfunding Subsidy Program and whose government provides additional marketing resources.

Sheng Xiaorong
Sheng Xiaorong is the Director-General of the Economic Development Department of New Taipei City.<SEP>The Director of the New Taipei City Government Department of Economic Development.

AI Tool Counseling
A new component of the 115 New Taipei City Crowdfunding Subsidy Program designed to enhance marketing application efficiency for participating teams.

AI-Driven Digital Transformation Wave
A global trend driven by Artificial Intelligence that impacts enterprise brands.

data.entity_name: New Taipei City Crowdfunding Subsidy Program
data.content:
New Taipei City Crowdfunding Subsidy Program
An ongoing initiative launched in 2020 by New Taipei City to assist brands from product verification to market expansion, which has supported 85 teams and raised over NT$245 million cumulatively.

data.entity_name: 115 New Taipei City Crowdfunding Subsidy Program
data.content:
115 New Taipei City Crowdfunding Subsidy Program
The current annual iteration of the New Taipei City Crowdfunding Subsidy Program, open for applications, which includes AI tool application and brand promotion counseling.

Brand Promotion Counseling
A new component of the 115 New Taipei City Crowdfunding Subsidy Program, combining expert courses and consulting to deepen brand positioning.

Application Briefing Session
An event held on April 14th at Banqiao Youth Career Base to provide information about the 115 New Taipei City Crowdfunding Subsidy Program, featuring consultant consultations and a lecture.

Banqiao Youth Career Base
The venue in New Taipei City where the Application Briefing Session for the 115 New Taipei City Crowdfunding Subsidy Program is held.

Huo Wan Design Studio
A design studio that previously participated in the New Taipei City Crowdfunding Subsidy Program, sharing practical experience and successfully raising over NT$6.7 million for their "Taiwanese Can Also Speak" product.

Taiwanese Can Also Speak
An interactive learning set developed by Huo Wan Design Studio, featuring a point-and-read APP and fun mechanisms to foster children's cultural identity, which achieved significant crowdfunding success.

NT$245 Million
The total cumulative fundraising amount achieved by teams advised under the New Taipei City Crowdfunding Subsidy Program since its inception.

NT$50,000
The amount of additional advertising and marketing resources offered by the New Taipei City government to selected teams in the 115 New Taipei City Crowdfunding Subsidy Program.

NT$6.7 Million
The amount raised during a second crowdfunding round by Huo Wan Design Studio for their "Taiwanese Can Also Speak" product.

Crowdfunding Mechanism
A financial method utilized by New Taipei City to support brands in product development and market entry.

Eligible Enterprises
Companies, businesses, or factories registered in New Taipei City that are qualified to participate in the 115 New Taipei City Crowdfunding Subsidy Program.

Program Website
An online platform where information about the New Taipei City Crowdfunding Subsidy Program can be found.

02-2700-9599#102 Hotline
A dedicated contact number for inquiries related to the New Taipei City Crowdfunding Subsidy Program.

April 14
The date for the Application Briefing Session of the 115 New Taipei City Crowdfunding Subsidy Program.

October 31, 2026
The deadline for selected teams in the 115 New Taipei City Crowdfunding Subsidy Program to complete platform listing to qualify for additional marketing resources.

Selected Teams
Teams chosen for the 115 New Taipei City Crowdfunding Subsidy Program, eligible for various support including additional marketing resources.

Marketing Application Efficiency
The effectiveness of marketing efforts, a focus area for AI Tool Counseling within the program.

Brand Positioning
The strategic market placement of a brand, which Brand Promotion Counseling aims to strengthen.

Sustainable Design Concepts
Concepts, alongside AI, that the 115 New Taipei City Crowdfunding Subsidy Program seeks in products or services for selection.

Brand Promotion Lecture
A lecture providing insights into brand promotion, offered during the Application Briefing Session.

One-on-One Consultant Consultation
A free, limited service offering personalized advice to participants at the Application Briefing Session.

Initial Crowdfunding Stage
The early phase of a crowdfunding campaign where brand exposure and market attention are critical.

85 Teams
The number of teams successfully advised by the New Taipei City Crowdfunding Subsidy Program since 2020.

data.entity_name: New Taipei City Government Department Of Economic Development
data.content:
New Taipei City Government Department Of Economic Development
A department of the New Taipei City Government responsible for economic development, compiling and promoting holiday offers and activities.

New Taipei
A city in Taiwan, promoted as a destination for holiday activities, shopping, dining, and entertainment.

Qingming And Children's Day Holiday
A consecutive holiday period in Taiwan being promoted for various activities.

Tamsui Area
A region within New Taipei, featured for its holiday activities and hotels.

Investment Attraction
A method employed by New Taipei City Government Department of Economic Development to vitalize public land and introduce quality commercial and tourism resources.

Fullon Hotel Tamsui Fishermen's Wharf
A hotel in the Tamsui Area offering a "Spring Tour Tamsui New Style" accommodation package and parent-child activities.

Public-Private Collaboration
A method employed by New Taipei City Government Department of Economic Development to vitalize public land and introduce quality commercial and tourism resources.

Spring Tour Tamsui New Style
A special accommodation package offered by Fullon Hotel Tamsui Fishermen's Wharf, including breakfast, afternoon tea, bicycle rental, and souvenir vouchers.

data.entity_name: Huwei Art And Cultural Leisure Park
data.content:
Huwei Art And Cultural Leisure Park
A leisure park in the Tamsui Area that houses the Golden Tulip Fabland Hotel.

Golden Tulip Fabland Hotel
A hotel located within Huwei Art and Cultural Leisure Park, offering a "Sandbag Fun Grab" family activity.

Sandbag Fun Grab
A parent-child interaction activity offered by Golden Tulip Fabland Hotel, providing dining discounts.

Lihpao Plaza
A plaza offering shopping vouchers during the holiday period.

Banqiao Area
A region within New Taipei where hotels offer parent-child dining and experience activities.

Hilton Taipei Sinban
A hotel in the Banqiao Area offering a "two adults bring one child free meal" promotion and a DIY afternoon tea activity.

Caesar Park Hotel Banqiao
A hotel offering scratch-painting experiences and children's gifts with dining.

Hotel Cham Cham Taipei
A hotel offering a parent-child accommodation package, including brand gifts and a chance to win prizes.

Honhui Plaza
A shopping mall offering various discount vouchers and shopping credits during the holiday, including special offers for children's counters.

Showtime Cinemas Lifestyle Store Shulin
A lifestyle store offering entertainment vouchers and food vouchers with spending or check-ins.

MITSUI OUTLET PARK Linkou
An outlet park offering member-exclusive gifts and points redemption activities, combined with various brand offers.

Commercial Investment Projects
Projects involving commercial investment and promotion, often offering holiday discounts and activities.

Parent-Child Activities
Activities designed for parents and children to enjoy together, offered by various establishments during the holiday.

Holiday Exclusive Offers
Special discounts and promotions available only during the holiday period.

Mixed-Use Complexes
Venues integrating shopping, dining, accommodation, and entertainment, developed by New Taipei City.

Local Industry Development
An outcome of New Taipei City's economic strategies, leading to growth in local industries.

Employment Opportunities
An outcome of New Taipei City's economic strategies, leading to the creation of jobs.

Economic Growth Momentum
The driving force behind economic expansion, which New Taipei City aims to inject into the city.

Shopping Credits
Credits that can be used for purchases, offered as part of promotions.

Entertainment Vouchers
Vouchers that grant access to entertainment experiences, offered as part of promotions.

Food Vouchers
Vouchers that provide discounts or free items for food, offered as part of promotions.

Brand Gifts
Promotional gifts bearing a brand's name, offered to guests.

Prize Draw Opportunity
A chance to win prizes, often offered as an incentive for hotel stays.

Accommodation Value For Money
A measure of how much value a customer gets for the price paid for accommodation.

Official Websites
Online platforms where detailed information about commercial investment projects and holiday activities can be found.

Discount Voucher
A voucher that provides a discount on purchases, offered as part of promotions by various commercial establishments.

DIY Experience
A hands-on activity where participants create something themselves, offered as part of parent-child programs.

Game Vouchers
Vouchers that can be used for games or entertainment, offered by Fullon Hotel Tamsui Fishermen's Wharf.

Scratch-Painting Experience
An interactive activity where participants reveal an image by scratching a surface, offered by Caesar Park Hotel Banqiao.
